# 🌡️ Climate Anomaly Report Template

**Use this template when you notice unusual insect activity that may be climate-related.**

---

## Report Summary

- **Destination:** [e.g., "Madeira, Portugal"]
- **Date of observation:** [e.g., "February 2026"]
- **Expected conditions:** [e.g., "Should be virtually zero bugs in Feb (dry, cool)"]

---

## What Changed?

- **Unusual observation:** [e.g., "Saw migrating mosquitoes near hotel gardens during cold snap"]
- **Are there new water features?** [e.g., "New hotel pool complex, irrigation扩建"]
- **Temperature anomaly?** [e.g., "Southern Europe has had record warmth this winter"]
- **Rainfall anomaly?** [e.g., "Unusually wet dry season for first time in years"]

---

## Species or Insect Type

- **What did you see?** [e.g., "Aedes aegypti mosquito — invasive species expanding range"]
- **How many?** [e.g., "Large swarms at dusk"]
- **Disease-carrying?** [e.g., "Yes, I know they can carry dengue"]

---

## Source Info (if available)

- **News articles / reports:** [links]
- **Climate data:** [links to local weather station records]

---

> 🔥 **Why this matters:** Climate change is pushing insect ranges poleward and to higher elevations. Destinations that were safe 5 years ago may not be safe today. Your reports help us update our guides before someone's trip is ruined!
